title: Zone Correction Document Payload
description: Schema for `automation_config_documents.payload` for namespace `zone.correction`. This is the outer wrapper stored in DB. Actual correction config lives under `base_config` (schema: zone_correction.v1.json). Phase overrides are partial subsets. Schema version 1.

preset_id.description: Preset reference (system or custom). Null = no preset.

base_config.description: Base correction config — authoritative. Phase overrides and resolved_config are derived.

phase_overrides.description: Phase overrides keyed by phase. PHP empty payload may serialize as `[]` (PHP ambiguity) instead of `{}` — both accepted; runtime treats list as no-overrides.

resolved_config.description: Computed merge of base_config + phase_overrides + cycle overrides. Regenerated by compiler. Empty {} is legal immediately after document creation, before first compile.

last_applied_at.description: Timestamp written by ZoneCorrectionAuthorityRepository.mark_applied (AE3 side). Optional metadata, not authoritative config.

last_applied_version.description: Version stamp written by AE3 mark_applied. Optional metadata.
